full_text:
Abhilash: Two pieces of adnexa were finely minced in a sterile petri dish. Then, the pieces were dissociated in X mL of Dispase + RQ1-RNAse free DNAse diluted in AdDF+++ medium according to the protocol.

After RBC lysis, the final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of dissociating medium

Cell count 1):

total: 1.20 E6

live: 1.13 E6

viability: 93.9%

Size: 10.3um

Cell count 2):

total: 1.22 E6

live: 1.11E5

viability: 91.2 %

Size: 9.9 um

Average cell count: E6 / mL

Total volume: mL

Final cell count: E6 cells

A) Drug treatment for IF in 384-well plate

Not done. There were no spare cells and we agreed with Anniina to prioritize flow cytometry experiments for the next 2 samples.

B) Flow cytometry 49 well plate

10 conditions, 6 replicates/condition = 60 wells

60 wells * 40 uL = 2400 uL -> 2500

Since the omentum gel starts polymerizing as soon as the aprotinin is added, it is better to make 3 separate tubes each one of 833.3 uL (approx. 2500 uL/3) and not everything at once in a single tube.

We want to keep a cell density of 1000 cells/uL, so the total number of cells per tube that will be

needed is: 1000 cells/uL * 833.3 uL = 0.833E6 cells/tube 0.833E6 cells / ( 1.21E6 cells/mL) = 688,7 uL (from the original cell suspension)

The amount of the remaining components per tube will be:

ORG full medium: (833.3 uL – 827.9 uL) = 5.4 uL extra ORG full medium

Omentum gel: 117.5

Aprotinin: 2.5

Thrombin: 2.5

Fibrinogen: 16.7

NOTE: Fibrinogen should be added just before pipetting to the wells. So, add everything to all 3 tubes except Fibrinogen. When you are ready to pipette add Fibrinogen one by one to each tube.

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 µl full ORG medium

→ Next day add drugs

C) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ two vials with aprox 0.5E6 cells were collected and stained with the antibodies from the drug testing panel according to the protocol.

C) Sample for cryo

As there were no cells left after culturing and flow cytometry, cells were not frozen.

Day 1 - Drug testing (Flow cytometry):

Prepare the stocks for drug testing in a 48 well plate as follows:

Prepare 9X stocks of each of the drugs so that 50 uL of each drug are added in the corresponding well. Final total volume per well after adding the drugs should be 450 uL. For example, for a layout like the following, the amounts to add of each liquid are indicated below:

End point ( day 4 / day 3 of drug treatment)

On day 3 of the drug-treatment, the cells were harvested for flow cytometry

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
